translation.en: They always encourage students to strive.

content.sentence: Họ luôn ___ học sinh cố gắng.

notes_md:
**khuyến khích** = to encourage, to support someone to do something positive. It’s about pushing someone gently in a good direction.

It’s a verb, often used when talking about study, work, healthy habits, or participation.  
You can also say **khuyến khích + việc gì** when talking about an action or policy.

Close synonym: **động viên** (more emotional support).  
Opposite idea: **ngăn cản** (to stop/prevent someone).

translation.en: We will encourage you to participate.

content.sentence: Chúng tôi sẽ ___ bạn tham gia.

notes:
khuyến khích = to encourage, to support someone to do something positive. It’s about pushing someone gently in a good direction.

It’s a verb, often used when talking about study, work, healthy habits, or participation.  
You can also say khuyến khích + việc gì when talking about an action or policy.

Close synonym: động viên (more emotional support).  
Opposite idea: ngăn cản (to stop/prevent someone).
exampleSentencesTranslated: He always encourage me to study English every day.
Parents often encourage their children to join extracurricular activities.
The teacher encourage us to ask many questions in class.

definitions.es: Dar apoyo, confianza o esperanza a alguien.
definitions.en: To give support, confidence, or hope to someone.
definitions.vi: Đưa ra sự hỗ trợ, tự tin hoặc hy vọng cho ai đó.

example.es: El maestro siempre anima a los estudiantes a participar en actividades extracurriculares.
example.en: The teacher always encourages students to participate in extracurricular activities.
example.vi: Giáo viên luôn khuyến khích học sinh tham gia các hoạt động ngoại khóa.

exampleSentences: Anh luôn khuyến khích em cố gắng học tiếng Anh mỗi ngày.
Bố mẹ thường khuyến khích con tham gia các hoạt động ngoại khóa.
Cô giáo đã khuyến khích chúng tôi đặt nhiều câu hỏi trong lớp.
